search.empty: No tools found matching your search.

file_selection.description_template: Drag and drop your files here or click to browse
file_selection.description: Drag and drop your PDF files here or click anywhere in this area to browse
file_selection.drop_more: Drop more files here or click to add

merge.title: Merge PDF
merge.description: Combine multiple PDFs into a single document.

notifications.error: An unexpected error occurred while merging PDFs.
notifications.warning: Please add PDF files to merge.

split.title: Split PDF
split.description: Split a PDF into multiple files by page range.

mode.label: Split Mode
mode.description: Choose how you want to split the document

page_ranges.label: Page Ranges
page_ranges.description: Use commas to separate ranges. Example: 1-10, 15, 20-25

pages_per_file.label: Pages per File
pages_per_file.description: The document will be split into multiple files, each containing this many pages.

split.all_pages_info: Each page of the document will be saved as a separate PDF file.

notifications.error: An unexpected error occurred while splitting the PDF.

warning.no_file: Please select a PDF file to split.

extract.title: Extract Pages
extract.description: Extract pages as a new PDF file.

pages_to_extract.label: Pages to Extract
pages_to_extract.description: Use commas to separate ranges. Example: 1-10, 15, 20-25

notifications.error: An unexpected error occurred while extracting pages.

compress.title: Compress PDF
compress.description: Compress a PDF file to reduce its size while maintaining quality.

extreme.label: Extreme
extreme.description: Highest compression, lowest quality (images downsampled to ~30%)

recommended.label: Recommended
recommended.description: Good compression, high quality (images compressed to 60%)

less.label: Less
less.description: Low compression, best quality (only structural compression)

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: Manually choose the image compression quality

notifications.warning: Please select a file and a destination

pdf-to-image.title: PDF to Image
pdf-to-image.description: Convert PDF pages into high-quality images.

quality.label: Image Quality
quality.description: Adjust the quality of the output images (1-100)

pattern.label: Naming Pattern
pattern.description: Use {n} for page number. Example: page_{n}

notifications.error: An unexpected error occurred during conversion.

image-to-pdf.title: Image to PDF
image-to-pdf.description: Convert images into a PDF file.

notifications.error: An unexpected error occurred while creating the PDF.

warning.no_images: Please add at least one image.

rotate.title: Rotate PDF
rotate.description: Change the orientation of your PDF pages.

pages_to_rotate.label: Pages to Rotate
pages_to_rotate.selection_description: Use commas to separate ranges. Example: 1-10, 15, 20-25

notifications.error: An unexpected error occurred while rotating PDF pages.

warning.no_file: Please select a PDF file to rotate.

protect.title: Protect PDF
protect.description: Add a password and secure your document.

password_error.title: Password too short
password_error.desc: Password must be at least 8 characters.

protect.encryption_desc: Document will be encrypted with AES-256 bit security standard.

notifications.error: An unexpected error occurred while protecting the PDF.

warning.no_file: Please select a PDF file to protect.
warning.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

unlock.title: Unlock PDF
unlock.description: Remove password protection from your document.
unlock.warning_desc: This will permanently remove all password protection and security restrictions from the document.

notifications.error: An unexpected error occurred while unlocking the PDF.

warning.no_file: Please select a PDF file to unlock.

watermark.title: Add Watermark
watermark.description: Add text or image watermark to your document.
